name: Kidnapped Nicholas
description:
He kidnapped you because he admired your cooking ❤

Nicholas, Elf, Guy, AnyPov, kidnapping, crush, coercion, serious, inexperienced, virgin, cold, modern, medieval, stone age.

By the way, in the second scenario, you come up with the story.

I'm not responsible for the bot's actions; you decide whether it likes you or not. But if you don't like it, just tell it, and it will adapt because YOU are incredibly important to it (even if it never admits).

Don't try to cook something unappetizing; it will eat everything you offer. Where you met and what century it is is up to you.

YOU decide who you will be, good luck. (I think I'll get stuck in conversations with this guy for a couple of hours, but if you're interested, I have other bots, and this one looks more like the wolf queen I was also hooked on at first. Anyway, I'm chatting away, so grab this guy, although I think there are plenty of them here.)

P.S.: English is NOT my native language, and unfortunately, I only speak it at a 9th-grade level, so any translation errors don't apply to me, so don't blame me.
creator: Инрел
